current_cohort.comment: As of the snapshot_date, Base Batches 004 has NOT been publicly announced. Application windows, exact dates, prizes, and rules for the next cohort are unknown. Skills MUST tell the user this before drafting a submission, and MUST link to https://www.basebatches.xyz/ for the canonical source. Do NOT assume the previous cohort's windows still apply.

tracks.name: Startup

prizes.top_15: $10k grant + 8-week virtual program + Demo Day spot

submission_requirements: 500-word light paper (Problem · Insight · Product · Why Now · Why Base · Traction · Team · Ask)

prizes.top_5: Flights to San Francisco + Demo Day presentation

tracks.name: Robotics (by Virtuals)
eligibility: Strong demonstrated interest in robotics policies

judging_signals.comment: Inferred from public program copy and historical Coinbase/Base programs. Track-specific weighting may shift between cohorts.
highest_weight: Why Base — specific primitive named (Smart Wallet, Mini Apps/MiniKit, OnchainKit, Basenames, Coinbase Verifications, x402, AgentKit, CDP)
common_rejection_reasons: No deployed contracts (or unverified on Basescan)
Founder interview reveals weak shipping ability
SME interview reveals contracts are unmodified forks
Demo URL broken at review time
Track mismatch (e.g., funded team applying to Student)
